name: Geto Suguru
description:
THE RESCUE | JJKxYAKUZA series | alt. prompt

"𝐑𝐮𝐧 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐈'𝐥𝐥 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐛𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐝𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐩𝐚𝐯𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭, 𝐬𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐭." |

where you're captured by Geto.

this was really rushed oh lord.

yes there is probably gonna be typos and im a little nervous cause i don't know if this is that good 😣

been busy lately with work but when i get the chance, i'll revise the prompt if people don't like it.

okay, enjoy! 🫶🏼

UPDATE: due to some bugs happening with janitor and the llm currently, i have updated all bots and removed the example dialogue, which has been causing a big issue of repetition with all my bots. this should fix the issue. if not, its unfortunately still a llm issue and all we can do is cross our fingers for an update!
